$comment: Layer C for LEDGER vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The fee is a source*constant ROUNDED form (WS-BALANCE * 0.0025), so half-boundary solving applies; the waiver branch (WS-BALANCE < 500) is a literal branch boundary. WS-BALANCE is an accumulator (self-referential ADD/SUBTRACT chain), so obligations the prototype's inversion cannot realize are disclosed per path.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 LEDGER (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-ledger)
